mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM erp_sale_order WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0 AND status = 1 AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM erp_purchase_order WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0 AND status = 3 AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_customer WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_supplier WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_leave_request r WHERE r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND r.del_flag = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM oa_leave_approval a WHERE a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND a.del_flag = 0 AND a.leave_id = r.id AND a.approver_user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 0 ) ) + ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_purchase_order p WHERE p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND p.del_flag = 0 AND p.status IN (1, 2) )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM erp_stock s INNER JOIN erp_product_info p ON p.id = s.product_id AND p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND p.del_flag = 0 WHERE s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND s.del_flag = 0 AND p.min_stock > 0 AND s.qty < p.min_stock

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM erp_sale_order WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0 AND status = 1 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM erp_purchase_order WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0 AND status = 3 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT si.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, SUM(si.quantity) AS saleQuantity, SUM(si.subtotal) AS saleAmount FROM erp_sale_order_item si INNER JOIN erp_sale_order so ON so.id = si.order_id AND so.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND so.del_flag = 0 AND so.status = 1 INNER JOIN erp_product_info p ON p.id = si.product_id AND p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND p.del_flag = 0 WHERE si.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND si.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY si.product_id, p.name ORDER BY saleQuantity DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, w.name AS warehouseName, s.qty AS currentQty, p.min_stock AS minStock FROM erp_stock s INNER JOIN erp_product_info p ON p.id = s.product_id AND p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND p.del_flag = 0 INNER JOIN erp_warehouse w ON w.id = s.warehouse_id AND w.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND w.del_flag = 0 WHERE s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND s.del_flag = 0 AND p.min_stock > 0 AND s.qty < p.min_stock ORDER BY (p.min_stock - s.qty) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
